calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-21-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Boessenecker appearing for Antonia Martin. Nancy Field appearing for Delia Foster.
Parties present arguement regarding objections to statutory fees, extraordinary fees, will contest fees and jewlery. The court takes the matter under submission.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Tina Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Rosie Noguera

Petition Of Special Administrator To Dispense With Requirement Of Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-08-2006 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2235 40th Ave. S.F.)
Off Calendar Mar-06-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Janet Boessenecker appearing for petitioner. Court questioned the lack of notice to Ruth Chupka. Counsel requested to dispense with notice to Ms. Chupka because she has no standing to object. Her request for special notice was not mailed to the personal representative or counsel. Court dispensed with notice to Ruth Chupka. Delia Foster's concern that peoperty was not properly marketed addressed. Sale is confirmed at $639,000.00. No Bond. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition Of Special Administrator To Dispense With Requirement Of Accounting
Off Calendar Feb-22-2006 Continued To Mar-08-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
